stimulus: A widely used platform for genomic data analysis, Galaxy allows bioinformaticians like Sapelo Bioinformatics co-founder Anika Patel ______blank workflows by combining sequencing reads with reference annotations.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the use of verb forms within a sentence. The nonfinite to-infinitive verb "to build" is correctly used to form a subordinate clause that expresses how Galaxy facilitates the building of workflows (by combining certain inputs).

Choice A is incorrect because it results in an ungrammatical sentence. The finite verb "built" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that expresses how Galaxy facilitates the building of workflows. Choice B is incorrect because it results in an ungrammatical sentence. The nonfinite participle "building" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that expresses how Galaxy facilitates the building of workflows. Choice C is incorrect because it results in an ungrammatical sentence. The finite verb "build" can't be used in this way to form a subordinate clause that expresses how Galaxy facilitates the building of workflows.
